verses.arabicText: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍۢ مُّبَٰرَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
verses.translationText: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].
On that night is made distinct every precise matter -

verses.arabicText: أَمْرًۭا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
verses.translationText: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

verses.arabicText: رَحْمَةًۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.translationText: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

verses.arabicText: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
verses.translationText: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.

verses.arabicText: لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translationText: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.
But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.

verses.arabicText: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.translationText: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke.
Covering the people; this is a painful torment.

verses.arabicText: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.translationText: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."

verses.arabicText: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.translationText: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.

verses.arabicText: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌۭ مَّجْنُونٌ
verses.translationText: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."

verses.arabicText: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
verses.translationText: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].

verses.arabicText: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
verses.translationText: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.

verses.arabicText: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ كَرِيمٌ
verses.translationText: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger,

verses.arabicText: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌۭ
verses.translationText: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allah. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"
